svg.text: Why every loop script gets rebuilt before more seeds:
the coordinate confounded value with answer position
the Phase-0 screen (2026-07-10) measured the confound directly — every number below is an actual read from experiments/phase0_screen/output/phase0_screen.json
The legacy instrument (behind every result so far)
The repaired harness (risk_harness.py) — gates every new run
P(choose the gamble) on the same held-out items — read with the gamble as option A vs as option B
gap ~0, but saturated at 1.00 — no headroom
